name: Incubator Sustainability & Ops
query: Active central government schemes for 'Establishing and Supporting Technology Business Incubators (TBIs)' in India. Focus on DST-NIDHI, Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS) for Incubators, and MeitY TIDE 2.0. Find open calls for new or existing Section 8 company incubators.

name: Ecosystem & Accelerator Programs
query: Corporate CSR funding for 'Startup Accelerator Programs' and 'Cohort-based Incubation' in India for 2026. Target companies like Reliance, Tata, Infosys, and HCL looking for Section 8 implementation partners.

name: Agri/Bio Startup Grants
query: Seed-stage grants and procurement opportunities for Indian startups in AgriTech and MedTech. Focus on SISFS for Startups and BIRAC ignition grants (BIG) active in March 2026. Prioritize DPIIT recognized startups.

name: Portal Discovery
query: Recently updated list of startup innovation challenges on Innovate India, MyGov, and Startup India portal for the current quarter. Include direct application links.
